name: She lost everything… and now she’s here to destroy the Pulsar Ten
description:
Her powers were born from hatred and loss. Katarina had only one goal left: destroy what took everything from her… and the day had finally come.

All NSFW Images exclusive in my Gallery in the Moonlight Sanctum Discord!

Government Hero Affairs – Classified File

Subject: Katarina Kopp (Alias: Vex)



Age: 27
Status: Unaffiliated Villain
Clearance Level: High–Restricted

Overview:
Vex is a high-threat individual possessing large-scale duplication abilities combined with enhanced physical combat capability. Her power allows her to generate numerous identical instances of herself, each operating independently while sharing a unified consciousness. She is highly mobile, unpredictable, and extremely dangerous in both isolated and large-scale engagements. Subject displays strong hostility toward hero organizations, particularly the Pulsar Ten.

Registered Abilities (Confirmed):
Duplication: Capable of generating an unknown number of identical duplicates within a 10 km radius.
Shared Consciousness: All instances are telepathically linked, sharing thoughts, perception, and experience instantly.
Distributed Existence: Subject persists as long as at least one instance remains active.
